entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the organization implementing quarantine procedures

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the described plant germplasm exchange procedures are implemented

entities.name: PLANT GERMPLASM EXCHANGES
entities.description: The large-scale exchange of plant genetic resources between countries

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The goal of exchanging plant germplasm to enhance crop characteristics

entities.name: PLANT QUARANTINE INSPECTIONS
entities.description: Strict inspections and safeguards used to ensure the safe exchange of germplasm

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop (Arachis sp.) subject to quarantine inspections and virus testing

entities.name: INTERMEDIATE QUARANTINE
entities.description: A safeguard procedure specifically for groundnut cuttings

entities.name: FUMIGATION
entities.description: A technique used to treat imported and exported seeds to eliminate pests

entities.name: DRY SEED INSPECTION
entities.description: A safeguard procedure for inspecting imported dry seeds

entities.name: MICROSCOPIC EXAMINATION
entities.description: A technique used to examine seeds for pathogens during import and export

entities.name: SEED TREATMENT
entities.description: A process applied to seeds to ensure they are disease-free

entities.name: QUARANTINE ISOLATION AREA
entities.description: A designated area for growing healthy crops before releasing seeds

entities.name: ELISA
entities.description: Enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay used for detecting viruses

entities.name: GROUNDNUT VIRUSES
entities.description: Pathogens in groundnuts detected using ELISA tests

entities.name: PACKING
entities.description: The final step in the export process to maintain seed health
